title: Zygophyllum berenicense
intro: Zygophyllum berenicense, also known as the Berenice's leaf spurge or Berenice's leaf, is a species of succulent plant in the family Zygophyllaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, making it useful for treating various health issues such as wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory problems. The bioactive constituents of Z. berenicense include saponins, flavonoids, and alkaloids, which are responsible for its medicinal activities. In traditional medicine, Z. berenicense is commonly prepared as a decoction or infusion, and is often used to make salves, ointments, and tinctures to treat skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory issues.
uses: Zygophyllum berenicense, also known as the desert caltrop, has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues.
